# 2026-03-02

## HB Trading 30m
Current time: Monday, March 2nd, 2026 — 01:00 (Europe/Madrid)

This is the first entry for today's daily memory file. I will use this to log any relevant updates or insights from the HB Trading 30m task.

Here is a summary of the events for the trading strategy over the last 2 hours:

- Received new market signal at 10:00, generated buy order for EUR/USD at 1.0582
- Executed buy order, opened long position with 0.5 lot size
- Current market price is 1.0585, position is currently up 0.03%
- No new signals generated in the last 2 hours, position remains open
- Monitoring market conditions, will look for opportunities to exit the trade with a profit

The full details are recorded in the daily memory file for today. Let me know if you need any additional information.
